message:
feat: add ldexp, nextafter, spacing functions for NumPy parity

Implements three missing NumPy functions:
- ldexp(mantissa, exponent): inverse of frexp, computes mantissa * 2^exponent
- nextafter(x1, x2): next representable floating-point value after x1 towards x2
- spacing(x): distance to the next representable floating-point value

All functions include comprehensive unit tests covering edge cases
(NaN, infinity, zero, subnormal values) and broadcast semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
